div.p: Priority-Based Dissemination for Gossip Membership Events

g.title: Reserved slots for local refutations and critical updates
FIFO storage for standard gossip dissemination
State map to ensure we don't disseminate stale information

ul.li: Inv-1: Priority events never drop to Regular store.
Inv-2: Seen Map entry must be pruned if Event is evicted.
Inv-3: Refutation (Local) always has highest precedence.

g.text: Dedup vs seen_map; push to Regular FIFO
